title: CX context — cancel mid-flow — graceful cancel, no cart
notes: Customer starts to order then changes mind. Turn 1: ORDER_START with no resolvable item → LLM ask_options (CHOOSING_OPTIONS). Turn 2: 'Actually never mind' matches ORDER_CANCEL deterministically → IDLE, empty cart.

llm.message: Which burger would you like? We have a few options — just let me know!
